shift_verdict: POSITION-INDEPENDENT: Token 0 dominates regardless of image content shift → likely architectural artifact, NOT spatial
ablation_verdict: CRITICAL BOTTLENECK: Token 0 carries vastly more info than other tokens → dangerous single-point dependency
overall_verdict: PROBLEMATIC BOTTLENECK: Token 0 is a real spatial patch (top-left), dominance is position-independent (not content-driven), and the model is architecturally dependent on it. This is an architectural shortcut, not meaningful compression.

shift_verdict: POSITION-DEPENDENT: Shift significantly reduces token 0 dominance → spatial content dependency
ablation_verdict: SINK (low impact): Token 0 carries similar info to random tokens → likely attention sink, not bottleneck
overall_verdict: INCONCLUSIVE: Need more data to determine bottleneck nature.
